title: CI canon and Asuka was Asukas mom
display_title: CI canon and Asuka was Asukas mom
wikitext:
[]: CI, canon and Asuka (was Asuka's mom)             Quote Post by Kezane » Tue Jan 17, 2006 7:17 am Wasn't she only found dead after Asuka had been chosen to be a pilot? How does that fit into the continuity & the theory about the dead mothers?

[]: Re: Asuka's mom             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Jan 17, 2006 12:16 pm Kezane wrote: Wasn't she only found dead after Asuka had been chosen to be a pilot? How does that fit into the continuity & the theory about the dead mothers?

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Jan 17, 2006 10:41 pm Personaly I think that idea is pretty good. after her contact experiment she would just be a Rei clone basically.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jan 18, 2006 10:51 am This is another one of those wonderfull grey areas in the series. You can't realy get a handle on how soles work in EVA to be 100% sure during scenes like this. The best thing for ya is probly to rewatch the show at some point ( and EoE ), and make up your own mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Archon Divinus » Wed Jan 18, 2006 4:16 pm Perhaps it was her death that resulted in Asuka being chosen as a pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Wed Jan 18, 2006 4:53 pm Archon Divinus wrote: Perhaps it was her death that resulted in Asuka being chosen as a pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Archon Divinus » Wed Jan 18, 2006 5:00 pm Space Penis wrote: Archon Divinus wrote: Perhaps it was her death that resulted in Asuka being chosen as a pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jan 19, 2006 3:50 pm she was in a hospital room, I could understand the monitouring.

[]:             Quote Post by GiftedPilot » Sat Oct 20, 2012 9:32 am Her soul was sucked in, but only the maternal half,so she went insane. this is why you hear her in EoE, when she says "you cant die!your alive!" you hear twice "die with me Asuka"

[]:             Quote Post by Pandymint » Tue Oct 23, 2012 12:11 am Asuka was chosen to be the pilot from the time they decided to use Kyoko's soul for Eva-02. For some reason (possibly a shorter exposure compared to Yui) her Contact Experiment only took her Maternal Aspects as has been said. Then she was driven clinically insane, hence her talking to the doll as if it were Asuka and calling Asuka 'That girl over there.' The fact that Asuka found out she was to be a pilot the day she found her mother dead is most likely mere coincidence.

[]:             Quote Post by Lurkis » Tue Oct 23, 2012 1:09 am I always figured the maternal aspect of Kyoko that was absorbed into Unit 02 and this was enough for Asuka to sync with. However, in EoE when Asuka finally wakes up and you hear both "I won't let you die" and "Die with me" does this imply the last part of Kyoko's soul was transferred into Unit 02 after her death?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Oct 23, 2012 1:14 am Lurkis wrote: I always figured the maternal aspect of Kyoko that was absorbed into Unit 02 and this was enough for Asuka to sync with. However, in EoE when Asuka finally wakes up and you hear both "I won't let you die" and "Die with me" does this imply the last part of Kyoko's soul was transferred into Unit 02 after her death?

[]:             Quote Post by Pandymint » Tue Oct 23, 2012 1:17 am That's a good point. I suppose it would be possible that her soul re-assimilated after death. And despite her maternal aspects being dominant, the insane soul struggled for dominance. EDIT: That...seems logical, riffraff. I wouldn't put anything past Nerv or Seele to get what they want.

[]:             Quote Post by Lurkis » Tue Oct 23, 2012 1:19 am riffraff11235 wrote: EDIT: New theory - What if Kyoko was actually subjected to a second contact experiment to remove the rest of her soul while she was still alive? After that, NERV could have killed her - if the procedure hadn't done it already - and set it up to look like a suicide. Paying off the coroner and a few hospital staff wouldn't be beyond them, in my opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Oct 23, 2012 1:22 am Lurkis wrote: Hmm... I think Nerv could have waited for Kyoko to off herself (seemed likely given her mental state) then transfer the soul. Agreed I wouldn't put it past them but Kyoko was still described as having a smile on her face when she died. I can't see that if someone killed her.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Oct 23, 2012 1:49 am I don't think I ever really considered this topic deeply before, but in retrospect it makes sense to me that they would have salvaged the rest of Kyoko's soul from her body and put it in there with what got sucked out in the contact experiment. Yui's and Kyoko's experiments were surely how Nerv even discovered that they could use mother-souls to make the Evas pilotable. (As I understand it, their tests were specifically part of developing what eventually became the dummy plug, the "artificial soul" for the purpose of getting the Evas to move.) As we know, later on they figure out how this stuff all works and start gathering up motherless candidates whose mothers' souls they apparently keep in stock. By the time it becomes that established a process, and also considering that we know they can salvage souls, for them not to recover the rest of Kyoko's soul and try to inject it in there with the rest would be folly, especially if they had reason to believe that having all the parts together in there would increase Asuka's synch ratio. (This, as contrasted with the idea that the only part of Kyoko that's in there is her maternal side. As for OMF's variation on the theory, I haven't considered it enough yet to have an opinion.)

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Oct 23, 2012 1:52 pm Monk Ed wrote: I don't think I ever really considered this topic deeply before, but in retrospect it makes sense to me that they would have salvaged the rest of Kyoko's soul from her body and put it in there with what got sucked out in the contact experiment.

[]:             Quote Post by Lurkis » Tue Oct 23, 2012 6:34 pm Bagheera wrote: What reason do they have to believe that? Don't forget, we know that partial souls are sufficient to activate Eva, as evidenced by Rei (hell, their experience with Kyoko might have been what gave them the idea of splitting Rei's soul to begin with -- once they know it works this is a way to kill two birds with one stone).

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Oct 23, 2012 6:47 pm Lurkis wrote: Let's use logic .

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Oct 23, 2012 7:06 pm Lurkis wrote: Rei and Unit 00 should also be proof that having a partial soul in an Eva can make it extremely unstable and prone to going berserk. Having a full soul to sync with would most likely overcome this.

[]: Re: Asuka's mom             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Jan 17, 2006 12:16 pm Kezane wrote: Wasn't she only found dead af
